name: mrzmyr-skills
description: Skills for TypeScript code review and skeptical implementation review.

interface.shortDescription: TypeScript principles and skeptical implementation review skills
interface.longDescription: Skills for applying TypeScript naming, parameter, error logging, and file-context principles, plus skeptical review of fallbacks, regex matching, custom code, and type assertions.
